textByHashes.a7ded308f039476a60f12a7b9e8333c429854ff0: Even with everything we're going through, I have to admit, that was an impressive fight to behold! I wish I could have joined you, friend. Now, let us return to the Nexus.
textByHashes.dd857e4e90a28d4edf2830f4ddeea96c31e4f69b: Amascut! She's always been a monster, but she's doing things now I never believed her to be capable of! Had I not let my guard down, she'd surely be regretting her choices by now.
textByHashes.1d58c1fb22f3e63611e1b65cafe34fb56e7bfb64: I guess we're lucky you came along when you did, my friend. I think you might have just given us a fighting chance!
textByHashes.e2085cd3fd23652cffbdd5cce0de874d0b879f48: Indeed. Were I not still weak, I would gladly deal with her myself, but I fear you will have to face Amascut without me.
textByHashes.8accad5f9fa71aa3512aa5c85e44311e054d7a93: You'll find her on the level below. If you can free the others, we should be able to open the way for you.
textByHashes.05c1b32f1832d0d4a1df4f684193085d6d5a7c8f: You'll find her on the level below. We have managed to open the way for you. Go now, and show her the error of her ways!
textByHashes.0aca26db9cbb3cc47e984fb5522ad39909f8dc96: My friend, Amascut has heavily weakened me, but I know you can do what is needed. If you can free the others, we should be able to open the way to the level below.
textByHashes.57c25a82cb11bdbbc77e6a5a9371d377fdfc4811: We have opened the way for you, my friend. Any other day, I would have joined you in the fight against Amascut, but this one is up to you. Go now, and show her the error of her ways!
textByHashes.82755233f83434a0be1bb3e757bb25031a94f75c: My friend, we would like to have a word with you before you head back inside.
textByHashes.b10c68c782b4772b332a181674a67c695a346f16: My friend, you managed what few have ever achieved. You overcame Amascut herself! I wish I could have been there to see it!
textByHashes.91b633820d2edc2977eadbc4ceccd4e71292de4a: Not to mention that he was under Amascut's control far longer than the rest of us. It will take him time to come to terms with his role in her plots.
textByHashes.5649ef30c375d8f223714a8bc2456c35246fdc84: Before we go any further... We didn't have much time for conversation back in the tomb. I'm sure you have some questions for us.
textByHashes.2c7990aee937ca2f008e3ab9e6b5f4cf2b9f9010: I am Tumeken's avatar of health, both physical and mental.
textByHashes.0e245110bbce528c39c12e54e1577971a5c9007e: Well when it comes to health, is strength not the ultimate goal? The strongest individual is one who is healthy in both body and mind, and what better way to celebrate that strength than in combat!
textByHashes.770682f44b71d474c6d8bb443352585308e0dbd5: Well health is not something to be hoarded, is it? Most weaknesses can be overcome, and it is the duty of the strong to help those less fortunate.
textByHashes.6faaa039bc26efcebba45e6081872d9ccb04c464: An interesting question. Why do you ask?
textByHashes.55e037301478688b0773404391e6f64fba383dc7: Not as much as you might think. Believe it or not, in some ways, I'm actually considered a bit boring! Why follow the human when you have a baboon god?
textByHashes.d797e9ec85ae8ed9df560cd7294317c3f541b6a9: Of course, people just following one of us was never really the intention anyway. We're a pantheon, and we all have a part to play.
textByHashes.40798b78c8a55d77a6e20416fe758f0c40907dd4: Now that Amascut is running with her tail between her legs, perhaps we can remind people of that.
textByHashes.87a43b74994ebaf0595706925349fb5ee9da80ac: We'll wait for you to return.
textByHashes.92b79c7478bb5e50cbc1761cbfe54e990ebe3e21: I'd say that's up to her. If she doesn't change her ways, her fate won't be pretty.
textByHashes.3012c90408eadba312acd3a05163a424653d0c6f: Icthlarin is limited in what he can do. His duties to the dead require constant attention.
textByHashes.d2ada10ae107bd513f23c34bb0c84bc971bdb0e1: If you asked a citizen of these lands, I'm sure they'd probably say yes.
textByHashes.12a9cd7db5d9899a482be1680485f3c2f0b698e8: You might hear some refer to us as the Avatars of Tumeken. We'd consider that a more fitting title.
textByHashes.bc2e4de3277f223e314e8a94896797074c712dfb: Amascut was hoping to change that today, but you showed her where to stick that plan!
textByHashes.885f69de28fce54a0254e70cacbb15d0752ec336: But don't worry, we don't intend to miss the fight against Amascut. I hope you'll stand alongside us when that day comes.
